name: unifi-protect-api-expert
description: Codex agent for implementing and troubleshooting Ubiquiti UniFi integrations, with deep UniFi Protect coverage.

interface.shortDescription: UniFi Protect and connector API specialist for integrations, payloads, events, and troubleshooting
interface.longDescription: Local Codex plugin focused on Ubiquiti UniFi APIs with strong grounding in the official UniFi Protect v6.2.88 documentation, including local `/integration` endpoints, cloud connector request forwarding through `api.ui.com`, WebSocket event streams, camera/media workflows, and common integration failure modes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me design, debug, or implement a UniFi Protect integration using the documented local or connector API paths
